project_title: AI-Powered Nutrition Agent — Personalized Dietary Guidance System
program: IBM SkillsBuild x Edunet Foundation x AICTE University Engagement 2026

student.name: Yashwanth Kumar H C
student.institution: Sri Sairam College of Engineering, Bengaluru

agents.name: Nutrition Knowledge Agent
agents.role: Retrieves and summarizes nutritional information using RAG

agents.name: Diet Recommendation Agent
agents.role: Generates personalized meal plans based on age, health conditions, dietary preferences, and fitness goals

agents.name: Health Advisory Agent
agents.role: Provides preventive health suggestions including disease-specific diets

agents.name: Food Log & Feedback Agent
agents.role: Logs meals via text, voice, or images and delivers instant nutritional analysis
